_comment: partnership-mediakit builds brand outreach materials: pitch paragraph, media kit sections, and rate card.
description: Brand partnership outreach package: pitch paragraph, media kit sections, and rate card.

steps.condition: action is generate (build the outreach package)

steps.input_from: the creator's own media kit + platform
steps.condition: action is critique; compares the kit's metrics to benchmark ranges (benchmark-compare) and reviews structure; degrades to structural_only when benchmarks are unsourced; does NOT score the internal Quality Gates

note: Benchmark rates are labeled as industry benchmarks, never as the creator's personal rates without explicit labeling. FTC disclosure note appears in pitch when content is sponsored.
